ddt:Target.Name: VC1CP010_A211_400_C1A HS Evo_V1.1
ddt:Target.Description:
Vehicle: XCB ;XDD ECU: VC1CP010
----------------------------------------------------------- Author: SELVARANI MARIKANI ----------------------------------------------------------- Input documents: DID : DID_List_A211_200(2-0) DTC :EventList_A211_200(2-0) Routine Controls:RID_List_A211_200(2-0) Mater file :DCM_DID_List_xxxx(9-0)
Historique: --------------------------------------------------------- 1-08-2022 VC1CP010_A211_400_C1A HS Evo_V1.1SMA) DZ110 Application Added
14-06-2022 VC1CP010_A211_400_C1A HS Evo_V1.1SMA) Incoherency in DIDs Modified -552 DID s with Subelements
24-05-2022) VC1CP010_A211_400_C1A HS Evo_V1.1SMA) -Implemented Vehicle XBGPH2 in the database [Request 834] -Read memeory By address Implemented -[$23]-Ref RFE_I03 dB I/O ;List to be Implemented Respective I/O Generic Screen applicable for the respective DIDs are mapped Few DIDs modified into Numeric Lists [Confirmation from Zahir] $01A6-$01AF And $01b0, $01B2 -01B5 And 01B6
(22-04-2022) VC1CP010_A211_400_C1A HS Evo_V1.0(SMA) -Added Applications X1316, X1317, X1316A and Note:DZ110(To be added ) -Added Vdiag $06/A211_0400 -For I/O screen, I'll send you by mail Mos_mon file and RAM adress (Yet to be shared) -DID Updated as per DID_List_A2110400(0-0)-77 New R_RW DIDs to be added ;80 RNew DID s with Subelement -DTC Updated as per EventList_A2110400(0-5)-96 New DTC_Fault types Added DTCFailureType, Missing Failure Type $89 Added -RID -$1009 And 2002 list updated RID_List_A2110400(0-0)
(15-02-2022) VC1CP010_A211_300_C1A HS Evo_V1.0(SMA) -Updated Screen Homologation VIN-$F190/Read- Coded as per spec/Mapped to the screen $F196 Mapped to the screen -Added Vdiag $06/A211_0300 -Updated Name VC1CP010_A211_300_C1A HS Evo_V1.0 -Updated DID list /DTC List as per "DID_List_A2110300(0-0)" -Updated 53 DTCs as per the list "EventList_A2110300(0-1)_new" -29 Screens updated as per the matched AEMS DID list ,db reference 7D00_9F0 -DTC Extended data service ($1903/1906/DID$017D)Updated-Same as c011 Inputs --Added frame for I/O Screen-Deatiled input for I.O yet to be received -Updated F802 And F80F[Reference spec -18 Bytes] -No RIDs And I/O requested to update
(20-10-2021) VC1CP010_A211_200_C1A HS _V1.0(SMA) -Added vehicle XCB;XDD -Daig ON CAN FD Protocol -Updated DIDList and DTC list -Updated Routine controls. -Space padded in DID $F194 and $F195;$F187 [Do Not Modify]

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.
